name: Christmas Eggnog
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the egg yolks in a bowl.
2. Gradually add sugar to the yolks while whisking constantly.
3. Slowly incorporate the scalded milk into the yolk mixture, stirring continuously until the custard coats a spoon.
4. Remove from heat and chill thoroughly.
5. In a separate clean bowl, beat egg whites until stiff peaks form.
6. Gently fold the beaten egg whites and whipped cream into the chilled custard.
7. Stir in the brandy and rum.
8. Chill for several hours to ensure flavors meld together.
9. Before serving, stir in vanilla if desired and sprinkle with ground nutmeg.
